name: Very Cheesey Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Low fat cottage/ricotta cheese (or combination)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet; sauté onion, garlic, and mushrooms until the onion is nearly soft.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except the final three (parmesan and bread crumbs) to the skillet and mix well.
4. Spread the mixture evenly in a large greased or sprayed shallow baking dish.
5. Arrange tomato slices over the top of the casserole.
6. Mix together parmesan cheese and bread crumbs; sprinkle this mixture over the tomatoes.
7. Bake for 40 minutes.
